details.summary: Partnering with ICAFoW 2026 provides organizations with an opportunity to showcase their brand, connect with industry leaders, researchers, policymakers, and innovators, and contribute to discussions shaping the future of Artificial Intelligence and work in Africa. Partners gain visibility, networking opportunities, and access to a diverse audience committed to innovation, digital transformation, and sustainable development.
